title: Nvidia Just Built Its Own PC Chip — Intel and Qualcomm Are Rattled
script: For 30 years Nvidia has made the GPU. Never a full chip. Until now. At Computex, CEO Jensen Huang announced the RTX Spark — Nvidia's first processor in decades. It combines a Blackwell GPU with an Arm CPU, 128 gigabytes of unified memory, and runs Windows natively. Dell, ASUS, Lenovo, and Microsoft are all building laptops around it. Ships this fall. Intel and Qualcomm just lost their biggest moat.
